category_sources: source_facts.description says Vermin concurrently detects minimum Python versions needed to run code; official README describes AST-based Python feature detection.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Vermin; source_facts.name is vermin.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README provides usage and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; official repository page is netromdk/vermin.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python version detection; official README documents AST analysis, linting, configuration, and CLI usage.
